title: RPYR-0001 — `pickle.dumps(ImportError())` aborts the interpreter: `__reduce__` unwraps `get_arg(0)` on an empty args tuple (`exceptions.rs`)
signature_note: line 1872 in the reviewed source tree (3290f287f); the a9c2c529b binary panics at exceptions.rs:1778 — ~94-line drift between the two checkouts.
guarded_twin: crates/vm/src/exceptions.rs — PyOSError.__reduce__ guards the same access with `args.len() >= 2 && args.len() <= 5`; PyBaseException.__reduce__ uses self.args() wholesale (no indexing)
notes: Latent since the crates/vm layout was created — git log -S shows the get_arg(0).unwrap() was never guarded, and no test exercises pickling a no-arg ImportError. The scanner originally ranked this only CONSIDER; the get_arg-signal calibration (added get_arg( to user_index_or_arity) promoted it to FIX, which the agent then confirmed.
